name: analyzing-financial-statements
tagline: Lists financial-ratio categories (profitability, liquidity, leverage, efficiency, valuation) and delegates all computation to two.
verdict: Description lacks a trigger cue; the skill body has zero actual ratio formulas or worked examples, depends entirely on undeclared external scripts with no failure handling, and leaves the missing-data fork undecided. Not unsafe, just thin and unverifiable as written.

highlights.summary: Description states what it calculates but never states when to invoke it — no trigger phrasing.
No 'NOT for' text anywhere in the skill.
'Handle missing values appropriately (use industry averages or exclude)' delegates the actual decision with no criterion for which applies.
